for_sales.sales_text:
Dockrell 17

Built 1989 in Tavistock

Uniquely rigged as a delightful gaffer.

LOD 17’

LOA 20’

Draft from 1’ to 3’ with centre plate down

Displacement.        500Kg

Ballast.                     227Kg

A delightful boat to sail, always gaining admiring glances where ever she goes. She has something of an Itchen Ferry look on the water but without the deep draft of a keel boat.

All new running rigging and blocks 2025.

New bespoke cockpit cover 2025

Road trailer and light board

All spars rubbed back to bare wood and oiled with Deks Olje D1 (12 coats).

Main sail, topsail on a yard and jib.
 4hp Outboard also available

boat.full_description: Centre board 17' day sailer, open cockpit transom hung rudder with outboard mounted to starboard
boat.name: Alys
